title: Add a new squash command
body:
Having a squash command would be great to eliminate historical file system artifacts that lead an image to some final state. Deleted and changed files could be completely pruned from overlayfs diffs, etc.

Related issues: [containers/libpod#3871](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3871#issuecomment-523649130), #1806.

comments.body: `buildah commit --squash` already does this job, only thing to be fixed is #1815. It would be interesting if podman itself offered a squash command to squash an image "in place", to evade some command dance that is necessary with `buildah commit --squash`.
